title: Private Equity Outlook Webinar
content:
## Private Equity Outlook Webinar
To register for this event or if you have any questions, please email clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Join us for our annual Private Equity Outlook webinar, where McCarthy Tétrault's Private Equity team takes stock of the lessons learned in 2025 and explores opportunities ahead for 2026. Based on our 10th annual Private Equity Outlook , this Q&A session will highlight key industry trends across Canada’s principal markets that are setting the pace for the year ahead. Topics include:
- 2025 in Numbers — Canadian Private Equity Overview
- Digital Infrastructure Investment in Canada
- A New Era of Defence Investment
- Beyond the Boom: Trends and Strategies Shaping PE Secondaries in 2026
- Canadian Take-Privates in 2025 and Looking Forward
- Corporate Venture Capital and Strategic Investments in High-Growth Tech Companies
- Canada-U.S. Trade: Building Resilience to Persistent Disruption from U.S. Tariffs
- Heightened Scrutiny of Minority Investments
- Canadian Tax Developments Relevant to Private Equity Investors
Speakers: Robert Anton , Jamie Becker , Matthew Cumming , Stephanie Dewey , Heidi Gordon , Martha Harrison , Aathmika Kularatnam , Debbie Salzberger and Patrick M. Shea . Moderated by: Jeremy Pleasant This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . Note : All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be sent a few days before the event.
